description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof with a prominent circular helipad marked with an 'H' at the center, surrounded by a blue surface that may represent a rooftop pool or terrace. The front facade showcases a curved bay window and a balcony with metal railings, accessible via a set of stairs leading to the main entrance. The exterior walls are finished in white brick, and large glass windows line the sides and rear, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The structure is elevated on a platform with a landscaped area and a secondary set of stairs at the rear. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The building appears to be spacious, likely containing multiple rooms on a single story.
description: A modern, white-brick bungalow with a flat roof featuring a circular helipad, large glass windows, and a curved bay window with a balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved bay window, balcony with metal railings, main entrance stairs, and the rooftop helipad.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large rectangular windows, the extension of the balcony, and the landscaped platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain white brick wall with minimal window openings and the rooftop helipad.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with grouped large windows, balcony extension, and rear stairs visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side windows and a curved bay window on the front facade
